name: Defeated Player | BLOCK TALES |
description:
ENEMY POV / DEFEATED PLAYER

"I-.. , i can't fight anymore.-"

"I- im sorry-."

I am back , and watch me dissapear again.`

Hi, i made a Block Tales bot,

For some reason i really , REALLY wanted a scenario where the player loses but the user is the enemy ,

Tbh , he can definitely beat you guys irl with a single ball

But this is all fiction and you have stronger plot armour so 🥀🥀💔💔

theres alternate version where you loses instead ,check it on my account , i know you will

ya freaks always does those kinks

I dont care if y'all go freaky on this bot , its not up to me that decide what y'all wanna do and to be honest ,

I only made this bot for that specific reason lol

Ahem. Enjoy , and if the bot responses as you , it aint my problem :cry: i wish i could fix it too man :cry: :broken_heart:

(Art credit on pin:https://pin.it/Bh30lg7W2)

I dont ask for followers , but please keep these comments coming , i cant stop laughing to read them
creator: Haruo
